name: Assault Bike Easy
issues: Drawn as an elliptical, not an air/assault bike

name: Rowing Machine Legs Only
issues: No rowing erg drawn — bench + dumbbells instead

name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
issues: Half-kneeling lunge, not a true 90/90 floor position

name: Bretzel Stretch
issues: Kneeling quad stretch, not the side-lying Bretzel twist

name: Reverse Curl
issues: Supinated grip (standard curl); biceps highlighted instead of forearm

name: Chakki Chalanasana (Mill Churning Pose)
issues: Side-lying twist, not seated wide-leg churning

name: Gada Figure 8 Swing
issues: Dumbbells instead of a gada/mace; duplicate + unlabeled arrows

name: Stairmaster Double Step Sprint
issues: Elliptical drawn, not a StairMaster

name: Elliptical No Hands
issues: Hand on handle — 'No Hands' requires hands off

name: Single-Leg Curl
issues: Quads highlighted instead of hamstrings; both legs used

name: Behind Neck Lat Pulldown
issues: Bar in front of face, not behind neck

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
issues: Biceps highlighted instead of triceps

name: Dumbbell Wrist Curl
issues: Full bicep-curl motion, not wrist flexion

name: Mixed Grip Hang
issues: Both hands pronated; mixed grip needs one supinated

name: Shinbox Get-Up
issues: Half-kneeling, not seated 90/90 shinbox

name: Front Squats Kettlelbell Over Shoulders
issues: Arrow labels have numbers but no text

name: Rowing Machine Pick Drill
issues: Cable seated-row station, not a rowing erg

name: Sandbag Zercher Carry
issues: Med-ball at chest, not sandbag in elbow crooks

name: Samtola Bent-Over Row
issues: Dumbbells instead of a samtola club

name: Battle Rope Lunges With Waves
issues: Third unlabeled arrow

name: Suspension Trainer With Grips Wide-Grip Inverted Row On Floor
issues: Near-upright, not low to floor; narrow grip

name: Foam Roll Lats
issues: Roller under mid-back, not side-lying lat roll

name: Sled Push
issues: Thin post, not a weighted prowler/sled

name: Single-Arm Rear Delt Machine Fly
issues: Both arms used; should be single-arm

name: Dumbbell Lying Single-Arm Supinated Triceps Extension
issues: Both arms/two dumbbells; should be single-arm

name: Pigeon Stretch
issues: Three arrows incl. duplicate/unlabeled

name: Cable Face Pull
issues: Faces away from machine; rope to back of head

name: Seated Elbow In Alternating Dumbbell Overhead Press
issues: Not seated; elbows flared not tucked

name: Smith Machine Romanian Deadlift
issues: No barbell visibly held

name: Wall Slide
issues: No wall depicted

name: Smith Machine Squat
issues: Extra duplicate/unlabeled arrows on left

name: Treadmill Side Shuffle Right
issues: Forward run stride, not lateral shuffle

name: Lat Stretch Wall
issues: No wall depicted

name: Single-Leg Extension
issues: Both legs used; should be single-leg

name: Tire Drag Backward
issues: Forward-facing drag, not backward

name: Hanuman Dand (Power Hindu Push-Up)
issues: Flat plank/push-up, not dive-bomber arc

name: Stairmaster Slow Deep Step
issues: Elliptical-like, not a stair climber

name: Stationary Bike Standing Climb
issues: Seated; standing climb needs out-of-saddle

name: Assault Bike Calories
issues: Upright bike w/ static handle; no dual arm handles

name: Sit-Ups
issues: Seated/upright, not supine start

name: Squat To Stand
issues: Plain squat, not toe-grab mobility drill

name: Hip Flexor Couch Stretch
issues: No couch/elevated rear foot

name: Treadmill Incline Jog
issues: Treadmill flat, no incline

name: Seal Jack
issues: Calves highlighted; reads as jumping jack

name: Battle Rope Slams
issues: Only one rope shown

name: Sandbag Bent-Over Row
issues: Ball not sandbag; erectors not lats

name: Battle Rope Squat To Press
issues: No squat shown

name: Stationary Bike Single-Leg Drill
issues: Both legs pedaling

name: Prone Scorpion
issues: Style inconsistent; no watermark/arrows

name: Matka Head Carry
